seo_description: feelMOOR, Germany's most advanced moor spa in the heart of the Allgäu. Health cures, thermal baths & spa, wellness packages and natural relaxation in Bad Wurzach.

hero.image_alt: feelMOOR Health Resort Bad Wurzach, exterior
hero.caption: Bad Wurzach · Allgäu
hero.headline_line2: in the heart of the Allgäu
hero.body: Germany's most advanced moor spa brings centuries of healing tradition together with contemporary luxury, thermal baths, health cures and natural relaxation under one roof.

moorheilbad.heading: Moor healing baths
moorheilbad.body: Natural moor more than 5,000 years old, an accredited remedy for orthopaedic conditions, rheumatism and rehabilitation.

therme.heading: Thermal baths & spa
therme.body: Thermal pool, sauna landscape and wellness treatments for deep relaxation and physical wellbeing.

nature.heading: Allgäu nature
nature.body: Set within the UNESCO biosphere reserve, hiking, cycling and nature experiences right on your doorstep.

rooms_section.caption: Accommodation
rooms_section.heading: Rooms & suites
rooms_section.body: Our rooms and suites are retreats of comfort, warm materials, natural colours and a design inspired by the Allgäu landscape.

therme_cta.caption: feelMOOR thermal baths
therme_cta.heading: Moor-water thermal baths & sauna landscape
therme_cta.body: Immerse yourself in soothing moor-water thermal baths, enjoy our extensive sauna landscape and experience exclusive spa treatments.
